sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, created_at DateTime, is_active UInt8);
SELECT id, addSeconds(created_at, 60) AS updated_created_at FROM test_dates WHERE is_active = 1 OR (is_active IS NULL AND addSeconds(created_at, 300) < now());
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_count FROM test_dates WHERE is_active = 1) AS active_users SELECT addSeconds(currentDate(), active_count) AS future_date FROM test_dates;

SELECT id, created_at, addSeconds(COALESCE(created_at, toDateTime('1970-01-01 00:00:00')), 30) AS adjusted_date FROM test_dates GROUP BY id HAVING adjusted_date > '2023-01-01 00:00:30' OR (id = 3 AND adjusted_date IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, addSeconds(created_at, CASE WHEN is_active = 1 THEN 3600 ELSE 7200 END) AS adjusted_time FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, adjusted_time, IF(adjusted_time IS NULL, 'No Time', 'Has Time') AS time_status FROM temp_table WHERE adjusted_time OR (1 = 1);
SELECT id, addSeconds(TO_DATE(created_at), CAST('30' AS UInt32)) AS future_date FROM test_dates ORDER BY (future_date OR toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00')) DESC;
